reasoning:

As the row clearly shows, the diagnosis, treatment, and vaccine fields are blank. This directly translates to "No", meaning no vaccine had been added to the list as of late March 2026. Because resolution is based on evaluating the page history at specific past dates (Nov 2025, Dec 2025, Feb 2026), and the value is still 'No' on 2026-03-28, it implies the value was also 'No' on the target dates. A web search confirmed that as of early 2026, no norovirus vaccine is approved or on the market, as multiple vaccine candidates are still in Phase 2 or Phase 3 clinical trials (e.g., Moderna's Phase 3 test requires reading from the 2025-2026 Northern Hemisphere season). Thus, it resolves to No for all listed dates. An estimate of 2% is provided to account for any negligible chance of an anomalous, quickly-reverted edit on those specific days, though it is extremely unlikely.
